reviews.review_description: Devs could you add a spawn gun so the players choose where to spawn something

developer_response.body: Great idea, me and the devs would like to add this to Monketek but the game is canceled for now for many bugs if we bring back Monketek i would add this feature

reviews.review_description: Ok this was like one of my favorite vr games the updates are awsome and the movement are getting better and better as well for the physics and new maps this is a must get if you dont want to phurchase chemp physics

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving a opinion on MonkeTek!!

reviews.review_description:
This game is extremely underrated and fun. It has super good physics with great mechanics and surprisingly good graphics. It’s fun to play with friends as u can make go carts and drive around l the maps.
For developer: 
I love this game and here are a few suggestions. Add a cosmetic shop, this would be super cool if u could customise your monke and maybe even a daily reward system to get players to play more. New updates every week, this would make the game extremely exciting as you could add new items, maps and even animals. Thanks for ready and download now!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! Me and the developers will think about the daily reward system and updates every week, Updating the game every week is really hard to do because we have to think about what to add and also it takes a long time to code everything. -tevr

reviews.review_description:
Bug 1: sometimes when you launch the game/join there is a very high chance you can spawn above the lobby of where you spawn meaning it’s very hard to join maps and to fix this. I recommend making it like the old one where you fall from the sky, so it’s not hard to make I think I’m not a game creator or anything.
Bug  2: if you accidentally press the public button to join a lobby you will have to restart the game because you can’t do anything you can’t leave and you can’t press the public button again because it won’t do anything  
Bug 3: the ragdoll button doesn’t work.
￼I’ll tell you if I have anything else to tell you oh yeah also before I forget, the gravity gun doesn’t work.  
also I’m on quest two so these might just be bugs for my headset.

developer_response.body: Thank you for reporting the bugs. Some bugs that you reported are only on the quest 2 and not the quest 3 or quest 3s. Dont worry because the dev team will fix the bugs right away for quest 2 users

reviews.review_description: This compared to other gtag physic games (e.g. chemp physics) its not that bad honestly
It is literally a copy of chemp physics but with worse physics and movement

developer_response.body:
its not a copy a copy is a one to one project. Monke mod is like chemp physics with some similarities but the game is post to be like Garry's mod not like chemp physics. The game is going in a direction that not many physic games do in the future there will be a tag game mode and horror with chapters. The physics are bad i do agree because  im not good with physics but im learning how to use physics.

-Tevr

reviews.review_description: Won't let me play the game because it won't let me select a name 0 STAR

developer_response.body: The bug that you reported should now be fixed. Thank you for telling me about the bug
